strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive and product ownership
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field as preferred
Limited demonstrated track record of shipped AI products or recognized AI platform expertise
Career history centers on senior/staff IC roles rather than director-level strategic influence with executives and strategic customers

key_factors.factor: Breadth of engineering experience and polyglot fluency
Entrepreneurial founder experience with open-source platform

response.justification: The candidate brings 15+ years of broad, hands-on engineering across cloud, web, and high-performance systems, plus founder experience and recent exposure to agentic AI tooling and MCP, which aligns with the builder/code/design fluency the role values. However, the resume lacks the recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, and director-level strategic advisory track record that a Principal-level AI Strategy role typically requires, making fit partial rather than strong.
